assertions_satisfied: AA.S5.1 (fixture 'Bohemian Rhapsody\tQueen' -> {title:'Bohemian Rhapsody', artist:'Queen'}) — verified locally

inline_deviation_notes: PS escape choice: used array-of-single-quoted-JS-strings joined with '\n' (rather than a template literal) so PowerShell backtick escapes (e.g., `t for tab in format string) pass through verbatim without JS template-literal interpretation. See dev-004.
PS timeout chosen as 4000ms (per dispatch instruction): well above probe-estimated ~400ms cold-start, below the 2000ms default poll cadence's tolerance for the off-by-one slow tick.
Q1 (researcher open subquestion): trust GetCurrentSession() (the OS-elected foreground media session) per probe default; AppUserModelId filter deferred.
